briefs.title: BC Updates Income Assistance Rules for Housing and Care Definitions, Effective December 1
briefs.summary: BC amended its income assistance regulations to update key definitions around housing (tenancy, security deposits, supportive housing) and care, and changed which rules apply to certain recipients. Most changes take effect December 1, 2025.

key_dates.label: BC Employment and Assistance Regulation housing/care definition changes take effect

briefs.industries: Labour & Employment, Landlord & Property Mgmt, Healthcare
